_readme: Ground truth for the Phase 1 regression harness. Every balance here was hand-verified against the source PDFs (sum of rows reconciles exactly, to the sen). The harness must assert these values after parsing — the pipeline is never allowed to grade its own homework. Amounts in RM. Negative = credit (CR) balance. All dates ISO 8601, Asia/Kuala_Lumpur.

cards.note: Printed holder name varies: 'DEAN LIM' on 2024 statements, full legal name on 2026 — MUST resolve to one card account.
Principal card. Statements also contain supplementary card 2505 sections.
Ex-Citibank format. Transactions on page 5 of 6. No posting-date column.

assertions: Opening 0.01 with a 3.69 CR payment takes running balance negative mid-cycle — no sign errors.
Older CIMB layout: no invoice number field.
Two payments (DUITNOW 1500.00 + Clicks 1000.00) sum 2500.00 > prior balance 1397.84 → prior cycle resolves paid_full (prepayment allowed).
Payment 4019.91 exactly equals prior balance → paid_full.
TWD FX row: '901NEW TAIWAN DOLLAR 4,440.00' → amount_rm 674.65, currency TWD (numeric ISO code 901).
CRITICAL REFUND FIXTURE: two Lazada CR rows 3090.31 and 3229.74 (posting 21 MAR) reverse purchases from the PRIOR statement — both typed refund, NOT payment.
Payment auto-detection for the Mar cycle must exclude these 6320.05 of refunds; actual payments this statement: 1240.00 + 1023.90.
FINANCE CHARGES 33.80 typed fee_interest.
Mid-cycle payment 128.92 exactly zeroes accrued spend at that point.
FINANCE CHARGES 5.49 typed fee_interest.
Three payments: 600.00 (DUITNOW) + 600.00 (Clicks) same day 03 JUN via different channels + 1990.00 (13 JUN) — three separate payment rows.
HKD FX row: '344HONG KONG DOLLAR 40.00' → amount_rm 24.53, currency HKD (numeric ISO code 344).
31 transaction rows. LATE CHARGES 71.83 and FINANCE CHARGES 120.57 typed fee_interest.
Two-line FX: Alipay*Taobao → amount_rm 443.36, original CNY 749.22 (RM stored as amount, CNY as metadata).
Promo text interleaved between rows must not become transactions.
Four payments in one cycle: CASH PAYMENT AT D591 3900.00, DUITNOW TO ACCOUNT 2800.00, Clicks 9000.00, Clicks 3515.66 — all typed payment (CASH PAYMENT is CR → payment, never cash_advance).
Cumulative payments vs prior balance 13374.87 drive payment status.
FINANCE CHARGES 11.16 typed fee_interest.
CRITICAL: opening balance printed '127.02 CR' — stored NEGATIVE; -127.02 + 1049.85 debits = 922.83 exactly.
YEAR BOUNDARY: transactions dated 16-30 Dec resolve to December 2025; Jan transactions to 2026.
Supplementary card 2505 section: 3 purchases (74.10, 27.10, 134.20) + payment 235.40 CR → closes 0.00; all four rows captured under card 2505.
Due date '07/03/2026' resolves to 7 Mar (20 days after statement), never 3 Jul.
Supplementary card 2505: zero activity, opening 0.00 = closing 0.00 — section parsed, no phantom rows.
CARD SERVICE TAX 25.00 typed fee_interest.
Due date 05/05/2026 is palindromic in dd/mm — both readings identical, must parse without a flag.
INSTALMENT: 'EP-OGAWA-36MTHS : 01/36' row 277.75 typed instalment; plan created: principal 9999.00, total 36 months, outstanding 9721.25.
Two-line FX rows WEIXIN (CNY 5572.63 → 3306.82) and ALP*Ctrip (CNY 6778.55 → 4022.42).
Supp card 2505: CARD SERVICE TAX 25.00 + payment 25.00 CR → closes 0.00.
INSTALMENT progression: 02/36, outstanding 9443.50 — plan record UPDATED, not duplicated.
NOTE: this file is uploaded TWICE in the fixture batch — the second copy must be rejected as duplicate (file hash), nothing overwritten or double-inserted.
INSTALMENT progression: 03/36, outstanding 9165.75.
Refund fixture: WEIXIN*China Housing CR 470.57 (merchant-named CR) typed refund, not payment.
Two payments: 150.00 + 320.00 (PYMT VIA SA/CA).
Due date '04/08/2026' = 4 Aug, never 8 Apr.
Transactions on page 5 of 6 — extraction must not assume position.
8 retail rows sum 203.40 (matches printed Retail Purchase total — secondary cross-check) + payment 200.00 CR.
No posting-date column — posting date nullable.

traps.reason: Business CURRENT ACCOUNT statement (deposit-account layout, running balance column) — NOT a credit card statement. Zero records committed; clear 'not a credit card statement' error.

traps.expected: REJECTED as duplicate by file hash
traps.reason: Deliberate duplicate in the batch; existing data never overwritten or double-inserted.

chains.then_gap: Jul 2024 through Apr 2026 statements missing — chain checker MUST flag this gap between 2024-06-19 and 2026-05-19, and the warnings must auto-clear as intervening statements are later uploaded. 2026-05-19 → 2026-06-19 link is unbroken.

chains.note: Earliest statement (2026-01-15) exempt from backward check. Closings: 922.83, 37.71, 304.00, 1345.80, 10252.94, 466.11, 513.36 — each equals next opening.

harness_rules: Every statement must reach status parsed_ok with reconciliation_delta exactly 0.00 — computed from extracted (immutable) values.
Assert opening/closing/due/minimum against this file, not against pipeline output.
Run the full suite on every code change (CI). A corrupted-copy test (one amount altered in any fixture) must land in needs_review, never parsed_ok.
Out-of-order import test: shuffle upload order; final state must be identical, chain warnings resolved.
All date assertions evaluated in Asia/Kuala_Lumpur.
